title: How To Manually Open Rear Hatch Liftgate Door With A Dead Battery On 2023-2026 Toyota Prius
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to procedure for getting inside the vehicle trunk/hatch on the Prius and Prius Prime PHEV if the 12V battery is dead or the rear hatch lock actuator is faulty and not working.

items.name: Mini LED work light to help you see what you are doing
Jumper Cables that I personally use to boost a dead battery
